function.message: Completed the next inbox item end-to-end. I ran the 8 specified finance documents through the OCR/frontmatter workflow by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each file and preserving each original note body below the frontmatter. After all 8 were processed, I deleted the inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), loaded relevant nested AGENTS and inbox/ocr/migration workflows, used finance schema for required fields, preserved original bodies verbatim under frontmatter, processed all files listed in inbox request, and deleted inbox item only after full completion per inbox-processing-v2-update.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly listed 8 finance files for OCR workflow. Each of those 8 files was read, then updated in place with required invoice/bill frontmatter fields from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md while retaining original body text. With all listed files completed, deleting the inbox file matches 99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
completed_steps_laconic: read workflow/schema AGENTS and relevant inbox+ocr+migration docs
write updated frontmatter+preserved body to all 8 records
